chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.29 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.02.2025 Khalifa Attaullah Langah, advocate for applicant Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl: P.G. Sindh ------------------------------------ Applicants/accused are present on interim pre-arrest bail. He seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.323/2024, registered at P.S. Sharafi Goth, Karachi for offence under sections 379/34, PPC. 2. It is alleged in the FIR that applicants/accused have stolen refrigerator from the shop of complainant. After registration of FIR, no recovery has been effected from applicants/accused. Counsel for applicants submits that applicants have settled their dispute with the complainant, however, today the complainant is called absent. 3. From contents of FIR, it appears that case of applicants/accused requires further inquiry in terms of Section 497, Cr.PC. In view of such position, learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection for confirmation of bail of applicants/accused. Therefore, interim pre-arrest bail already granted to them by this Court vide order dated 03.01.2025, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
